title: Verify P3T33b lifecycle label progression
description: Verify P3T33b: monitor GitHub issue labels for task 2689-260418-115246 as the Kody pipeline runs and confirm labels progress in sequence: kody:planning → kody:building → kody:verifying → kody:review → kody:done, with the complexity label persisting throughout. The label-progression logic lives in the Kody engine (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine); this task only observes and verifies the documented contract holds.
